notes: Company sustainability hub; use Firecrawl for live extraction if enabled.
mock_text: DBS describes progress on net zero targets, financed emissions measurement, sustainable finance, employee training, board oversight of sustainability matters, and climate risk management. The report references Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions disclosures and efforts to improve data governance for climate reporting.

notes: Careers page to capture sustainability hiring intent.
mock_text: DBS is hiring data governance specialists, sustainable finance analysts, cybersecurity engineers, and risk management roles. Several roles mention climate data, ESG reporting, and automation of regulatory reporting workflows.

notes: Risk and newsroom page for recent operational or governance issues.
mock_text: DBS continued to invest in operational resilience and cybersecurity after prior digital service disruptions. The company stated that technology risk management and customer service reliability remain management priorities.

notes: Company sustainability hub.
mock_text: Keppel reports decarbonisation initiatives across infrastructure assets, renewable energy growth, green building solutions, water and waste management, board sustainability oversight, and climate-related risk management. The company references Scope 1 and Scope 2 greenhouse gas emissions and transition risk.

notes: Company announcements and strategic updates.
mock_text: Keppel announced new sustainability-linked projects and investments in energy efficiency, district cooling, and low-carbon infrastructure. The announcements point to forward-looking capital deployment toward climate opportunities.

notes: Annual report page for governance and risk management disclosures.
mock_text: Keppel's annual reporting describes board composition, audit and risk committee oversight, anti-corruption policies, compliance training, and enterprise risk management. The company highlights climate resilience and portfolio transformation.

notes: Sustainability hub for real estate decarbonisation and green building metrics.
mock_text: CapitaLand Investment highlights green building certification, energy efficiency, renewable electricity procurement, water management, waste reduction, employee development, and board-level governance. The company discusses Scope 1, Scope 2, and selected Scope 3 emissions.

notes: Newsroom for sustainable investment and property announcements.
mock_text: CapitaLand Investment announced asset enhancement initiatives focused on energy efficiency, smart building systems, and green lease programmes. The company links digital transformation with lower energy consumption across managed assets.

notes: Careers page for sustainability and digital job signals.
mock_text: Open roles mention sustainability reporting, green building operations, data analytics, automation, and workplace safety. These postings suggest ongoing investment in ESG execution capability rather than communications only.

notes: Aviation sustainability page.
mock_text: Singapore Airlines describes fuel efficiency, sustainable aviation fuel initiatives, waste reduction on flights, employee safety, customer accessibility, and climate-related disclosures. Aviation emissions remain a material transition risk.

notes: Company media releases.
mock_text: Singapore Airlines announced fleet renewal, operational efficiency initiatives, and partnerships relating to sustainable aviation fuel. These actions are forward-looking but depend on industry-wide fuel availability.

notes: Sector risk source for hard-to-abate aviation emissions.
mock_text: Aviation faces continued scrutiny over carbon emissions, transition risk, and reliance on offsets or sustainable aviation fuel. Investors may monitor whether emissions intensity reductions keep pace with traffic recovery.

notes: Energy transition and sustainability hub.
mock_text: Sembcorp Industries highlights renewable energy portfolio expansion, emissions intensity reduction, climate transition planning, water stewardship, workplace safety, and board oversight of sustainability. The company reports Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions.

notes: Investor announcements for renewable project updates.
mock_text: Sembcorp announced additional renewable energy capacity and investment in low-carbon energy assets. The announcement indicates capital deployment toward transition opportunities.

notes: Transition-risk source for fossil fuel exposure.
mock_text: Sembcorp remains exposed to transition risk because parts of the energy portfolio are linked to conventional power generation. The company states it is managing this risk through portfolio transformation and renewables growth.

notes: Agribusiness sustainability hub.
mock_text: Wilmar International reports on no-deforestation commitments, traceability, supplier engagement, human rights, worker safety, emissions, waste, water, and grievance mechanisms. Palm oil supply chains remain exposed to environmental and social controversy risk.

notes: Grievance and risk source.
mock_text: Wilmar maintains a grievance procedure covering supplier allegations related to deforestation, land rights, labour standards, and community impact. Open or repeated grievances can indicate negative environmental or social risk.

notes: Media releases and company updates.
mock_text: Wilmar announced supplier engagement programmes and digital traceability tools intended to improve monitoring of deforestation and labour risks in its supply chain.

notes: Telecom sustainability hub.
mock_text: Singtel reports emissions reduction, renewable energy procurement, network energy efficiency, cybersecurity, data governance, digital inclusion, employee wellbeing, diversity, and board sustainability oversight.

notes: Careers source for cybersecurity and digital transformation signals.
mock_text: Singtel is hiring cybersecurity engineers, cloud automation specialists, data governance roles, and sustainability reporting support roles. These job postings indicate forward-looking investment in governance and digital resilience.

notes: News source for cyber or customer impact risk.
mock_text: Telecom operators face regulatory and reputational risk from data breaches, service outages, cybersecurity incidents, and customer privacy concerns. Singtel identifies cybersecurity and data protection as important risk management priorities.

notes: Bank sustainability hub.
mock_text: OCBC describes sustainable finance growth, climate risk assessment, financed emissions measurement, diversity, employee learning, governance policies, anti-corruption training, and board oversight. The bank discloses Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions.

notes: Investor relations source for governance and financial-risk framing.
mock_text: OCBC's investor materials describe risk governance, audit controls, board independence, climate scenario analysis, and integration of ESG factors into credit assessment.

notes: Careers source for sustainability intent.
mock_text: OCBC is hiring roles related to sustainable finance, regulatory reporting automation, data analytics, cybersecurity, and risk management. This supports forward-looking ESG execution signals.

notes: Bank sustainability hub.
mock_text: UOB reports responsible financing, sustainable finance, climate risk management, financed emissions, employee development, diversity, anti-corruption training, and board oversight of sustainability and risk.

notes: Newsroom source for sustainability-linked products and initiatives.
mock_text: UOB announced sustainability-linked financing, green loans, and support for clients' transition planning. These announcements suggest capital deployment toward climate opportunities.

notes: Sector risk source for financed emissions and transition exposure.
mock_text: Banks face scrutiny over financed emissions, fossil fuel exposure, greenwashing claims, and transition-risk governance. UOB states that it manages these risks through responsible financing frameworks.

notes: Group sustainability hub.

notes: News source for portfolio and sustainability initiatives.
mock_text: Mapletree announced asset management initiatives involving green leases, smart building technology, and energy efficiency retrofits. These initiatives are forward-looking signals for real estate emissions intensity.

notes: Investor relations source for governance and reporting.
mock_text: Mapletree's reporting describes board oversight, audit processes, risk management, climate-related risk assessment, and anti-corruption policies. The company tracks emissions, energy, water, and employee safety indicators.
